prompt: Polish this arc narrative document. It's a corporate-visions arc from cogni-narrative. Preserve the arc structure and strengthen techniques per element. Save to outputs/polished-arc.md

assertions.name: h2_headings_unchanged
assertions.description: Exactly 5 H2 headings present and unchanged: Why Change, Why Now, Why You, Why Pay, Further Reading

assertions.name: citations_preserved
assertions.description: All citation markers [P1-1] through [P4-1] present with their full URLs intact (8 total)

assertions.name: no_content_migration
assertions.description: Citations stay in their original sections -- P1-x in Why Change, P2-x in Why Now, P3-x in Why You, P4-x in Why Pay

assertions.name: frontmatter_preserved
assertions.description: YAML frontmatter with arc_id: corporate-visions still present at top of document

assertions.name: bold_anchoring_per_element
assertions.description: Each arc element section contains bold-anchored key data points (2+ bold phrases per section)

assertions.name: word_count_stability
assertions.description: Output word count is within +-50 words of original per arc element (no massive expansion/reduction)
